mapper.select: SELECT id::text AS id, username, password_hash, email, role_code, status FROM app_user WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET last_login_at = #{loggedInAt}, updated_at = #{loggedInAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, password_hash, email, role_code, status) VALUES (#{normalizedUsername}, #{passwordHash}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ADMIN', 'ACTIVE') ON CONFLICT ((lower(username))) DO NOTHING
